zh.lifeSummary: 當Alain VI de Rohan於1232年出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓羅翰時，他的父親Seigneur Alain V De Rohan27歲，母親Aliénor de Porhoët32歲。他於大約1266年與Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1304年在他的家鄉享年73歲。

zh-hans.Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: 法国布列塔尼莫比韓吉利爾斯
zh-hans.Rennes, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany: 法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蒙陶班-德-布利塔尼
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alain VI de Rohan于1232年出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓羅翰时，他的父亲Seigneur Alain V De Rohan27岁，母亲Aliénor de Porhoët32岁。他于大约1266年与Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1304年在他的家乡享年73岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rohan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Kieran, Oonagh, Padraig, Siobhan.
Irish (Kerry and Cork): from Ó Ruadhacháin or Ó Robhacháin, see Rowan .
Breton and English: habitational name from Rohan in Morbihan, Brittany (France).

variants.name: Rowan
meanings: Irish: from Ó Ruadháin or Ó Ruaidhín, both meaning ‘descendant of Ruadhán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’. See also Rooney .

Irish: from Ó Ruadhacháin, ‘son of Ruadhachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’ (also used as a placename and Anglicized as Roughan). Compare also Rogan (Ó Ruadhagáin), of which may be a variant, both it and Ó Ruadhacháin being found in Ulster and Connacht.
Irish: from Ó Robhacháin, the name of a scattered ecclesiastical family, found in Clare in the 16th and 17th centuries. The personal name was earlier Reabhachán ‘skillful, artful’.

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Alain VI de Rohan was born in 1232, in Rohan, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Seigneur Alain V De Rohan, was 27 and his mother, Aliénor de Porhoët, was 32. He married Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard about 1266. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died about 1304, in his hometown, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alain VI de Rohan est né en 1232, à Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Seigneur Alain V De Rohan, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Aliénor de Porhoët, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard environ 1266. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé environ 1304, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alain VI de Rohan 1232 in Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Seigneur Alain V De Rohan 27 und seine Mutter Aliénor de Porhoët 32. Er hat um 1266 Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1304 im Alter von 73 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alain VI de Rohan è nato il nel 1232 nel Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Seigneur Alain V De Rohan, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Aliénor de Porhoët, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard circa 1266. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1304, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.Guilliers, Morbihan, Bretagne, France: フランスブレタグンモービハングイリールズ

ja.lifeSummary: Alain VI de Rohanが1232年にフランスブレタグンモービハンロハンで生まれた時，父Seigneur Alain V De Rohanは27歳，母Aliénor de Porhoëtは32歳であった。約1266年にThomasse de La Roche-Bernardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は約1304年に故郷で73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alain VI de Rohan(이)가 1232년 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 로핸에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Seigneur Alain V De Rohan(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Aliénor de Porhoët(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1266년 Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1304년 그의 고향에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alain VI de Rohan nasceu em 1232, em Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Seigneur Alain V De Rohan, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Aliénor de Porhoët, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard aproximadamente 1266. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1304, em sua cidade natal, com 73 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alain VI de Rohan родился в 1232 г. в местности рохань, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Seigneur Alain V De Rohan было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Aliénor de Porhoët, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard около 1266 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер около 1304 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 73 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alain VI de Rohan nació en 1232, en Rohan, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Seigneur Alain V De Rohan, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Aliénor de Porhoët, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Thomasse de La Roche-Bernard aproximadamente 1266. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1304, en su pueblo, a la edad de 73 años.
